notes: It had some graphical issues, but everything works perfectly when you use Wine D3d11 with the following launch options: "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%".
title: ManaRocks

notes: Running perfectly. There was no need to change anything.
title: ManaRocks

notes: There's a few glitches and it doesn't run nearly as well as a native build would. The biggest issues were stuttering, audio distortion/crackling, and occasional lock-ups. I tried the game on Windows as well, and none of those issues exist, so I have reason to believe that the issues would not be a problem with a native build.
title: ManaRocks
